summary: Comprehensive testing of Indian Markets Arbitrage Platform completed. Backend APIs fully functional (26/26 tests passed), frontend login page working correctly, but authentication integration has session persistence issues preventing full frontend testing.

integration_issues.issue: Session tokens created programmatically don't persist through page navigation, causing 401 errors on protected routes

passed_tests: Market data endpoints (6/6) - indices, stocks, F&O stocks
All arbitrage calculation endpoints (6/6) - cross-exchange, cash-carry, synthetic, calendar, statistical
Analytics endpoints (2/2) - performance metrics, weekday analysis
Risk management endpoints (3/3) - position sizing, VaR, margin
Authentication endpoints (4/4) - user creation, session, settings, watchlist
Frontend login page loads with Google OAuth button
Login page UI elements and styling

action_item_for_main_agent.authentication_integration: Fix session cookie persistence issue between frontend and backend. The programmatically created session tokens are not being properly validated by the backend auth middleware, causing 401 errors on protected routes.
action_item_for_main_agent.testing_limitation: Due to Emergent OAuth integration, full frontend testing requires either implementing test auth bypass or using actual OAuth flow.

success_percentage.frontend: 50% (login page works, protected pages need auth fix)
